economic_notes: Nation participates in Cascade Power Project (900MW natural gas power plant near Edson AB) through Kehewin Power Trust via Indigenous Communities Syndicate LP. AIOC provided $93M in loan guarantees. Seven Lakes Oilfield Services LP had revenues of $83M and Pimee Well Servicing LP had revenues of $27.6M. Nation owns interests in oil and gas, trucking, contracting, and travel centre businesses.
notes: Revenue figures include deferred revenue movements (prior period deferred revenue recognized and current period deferred to next year), making reported revenue $47.9M. Four GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: 681415 Alberta Ltd., Kwayaskwaw Contracting Ltd., Kehewin Power Trust, and Kehewin Travel Centre. Three trust entities (Legacy Trust, Treaty Land Entitlement Trust, Specific Claims Settlement Trust) are included in consolidation but reported as separate segments. Three entities recorded at cost method: Pimee Kehewin General Store LP, SLS Metalworks LP, Pimee Education Foundation. Unrestricted surplus is negative at -$9,582,855. Large projects under construction of $24.2M not yet amortized. OSR estimated as total revenue minus ISC, Tribal Chiefs, FNIHB, FNDF, CMHC, and Government of Alberta transfers. Schedule of remuneration not included in provided text.
